mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ehs_budget_plan
AND budget_year = #{budgetYear}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_ehs_budget_plan (budget_year, category, item_name, plan_amount, note, writer, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{budgetYear}, #{category}, #{itemName}, #{planAmount}, #{note}, #{writer}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_ehs_budget_plan SET budget_year = #{budgetYear}, category = #{category}, item_name = #{itemName}, plan_amount = #{planAmount}, note = #{note}, writer = #{writer}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
